title: gastrolychnis saxatilis
intro: Gastrolychnis saxatilis, also known as the saxatile gastrolychnis, is a type of plant that belongs to the gentian family, known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains iridoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and are used to treat digestive issues and other health problems. Some of the health benefits associated with gastrolychnis saxatilis include relief from nausea and vomiting, as well as improvement in digestion and appetite. Gastrolychnis saxatilis can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, for oral consumption.
